ex.jp: 有名な監督が新作映画の制作を発表した。
ex.en: A famous director announced the production of a new film.

qs.s: 彼女は長年、映画の＿＿＿＿に携わってきた。
qs.en: She has been involved in film production for many years.
qs.e: 制作 = producing creative works (films, TV, art). 製造 = manufacturing physical goods. 制度 = system/institution. 設定 = settings/configuration.

qs.s: 「制作」の意味は？
o: production; creation of a creative work
qs.e: 制作 refers to making creative or artistic works (映画制作 = film production, 番組制作 = TV program production). 製造 is for manufactured goods.

ex.jp: 専門家がニュースをわかりやすく解説した。
ex.en: An expert explained the news in an easy-to-understand way.

qs.s: 試合後、監督が戦術を詳しく＿＿＿＿してくれた。
qs.en: After the match, the coach explained the tactics in detail.
qs.e: 解説する = to explain or commentate in detail. 解決 = resolution (solving a problem). 発表 = announcement. 報告 = report.

qs.s: 「解説」の意味は？
qs.e: 解説 = breaking something down and explaining it clearly (often expert commentary on news, sports, or technical topics). 解決 = solving/resolving.

m: recruitment; call for applicants or entries

ex.jp: 会社では今、新入社員を募集しています。
ex.en: The company is currently recruiting new employees.

qs.s: アルバイトを＿＿＿＿するポスターが貼ってあった。
qs.en: There was a poster recruiting part-time workers.
qs.e: 募集する = to solicit or recruit (the organization's action). 採用 = to hire/select. 応募 = to apply (the applicant's action). 求職 = job-seeking.

qs.s: 「募集」の意味は？
qs.e: 募集 is the act of calling for applicants, entries, or participants. 応募 is the applicant's act of responding to that call — they are opposite sides of the same process.

ex.jp: この製品は安全基準を満たしていない。
ex.en: This product does not meet safety standards.

qs.s: 評価の＿＿＿＿が不明確だと、公平な審査ができない。
qs.en: If the evaluation criteria are unclear, a fair assessment cannot be made.
qs.e: 基準 = standard or criterion used to judge or measure. 規則 = rule/regulation. 基礎 = foundation/basics. 条件 = condition/requirement.

qs.s: 「基準」の意味は？
qs.e: 基準 is the yardstick used to judge something (合格基準 = passing criteria, 安全基準 = safety standard). It implies a reference point, not just a rule.

ex.jp: 社長が自ら出向いて謝罪した。
ex.en: The president went in person to apologize.

qs.s: 問題が起きたとき、リーダーは＿＿＿＿動いて解決した。
qs.en: When a problem arose, the leader personally stepped in to resolve it.
qs.e: 自ら = by/for oneself, in person (emphasizes personal direct action). 互いに = mutually, with each other. 改めて = once again, formally. ひとりでに = by itself, spontaneously (without anyone's involvement).

qs.s: 「自ら」の意味は？
qs.e: 自ら emphasizes that the subject takes direct personal action themselves — often despite being in a position where they could delegate. Not the same as ひとりでに (which means with no person involved at all).

m: structure; framework; how something is built

ex.jp: この建物の構造はとても複雑だ。
ex.en: The structure of this building is very complex.

qs.s: 社会の＿＿＿＿が変わり、家族のあり方も多様になった。
qs.en: As the structure of society has changed, the way families live has also become more diverse.
qs.e: 構造 = overall framework or structure. 構成 = composition, how parts are arranged together. 制度 = institution/system (rules-based). 組織 = organization (a body of people).

qs.s: 「構造」の意味は？
o: structure; framework; how something is built
qs.e: 構造 refers to the internal arrangement that makes something what it is — used for buildings (建物の構造), sentences (文の構造), societies (社会構造), etc.

ex.jp: システムのエラーにより、サービスが一時停止した。
ex.en: Due to a system error, the service was temporarily suspended.

qs.s: 工事のため、この道路は通行が＿＿＿＿されています。
qs.en: Due to construction, traffic on this road has been stopped.
qs.e: 停止 = to halt or stop (temporarily or fully). 禁止 = prohibition (not allowed). 中断 = interruption (a pause mid-way through). 廃止 = abolition (permanent discontinuation of a system or rule).

qs.s: 「停止」の意味は？
qs.e: 停止 = bringing movement or operation to a stop (車が停止する = the car stops, 業務停止 = suspension of operations). Can be temporary or permanent.

ex.jp: 参加者は各々、異なる意見を述べた。
ex.en: Each of the participants stated different opinions.

qs.s: チームのメンバーが＿＿＿＿の担当部分を仕上げた。
qs.en: Each team member finished their own assigned section.
qs.e: 各々 = each one individually. たがいに = mutually, to/with each other. いっせいに = all at once, simultaneously. ひとりでに = by itself, spontaneously.

qs.s: 「各々」の意味は？
qs.e: 各々 (おのおの) is slightly more formal than それぞれ but means the same: each individual one, separately. Often used in formal or written contexts.

ex.jp: 駅の周辺には多くのカフェがある。
ex.en: There are many cafes in the area around the station.

qs.s: 工場の＿＿＿＿に住む人々から騒音の苦情が相次いだ。
qs.en: Noise complaints came one after another from people living in the area around the factory.
qs.e: 周辺 = surrounding zone or area (broader concept). 付近 = vicinity, near a specific point. 郊外 = suburbs/outskirts (further from city center). 境界 = boundary, border.

qs.s: 「周辺」の意味は？
qs.e: 周辺 describes the area surrounding something (駅周辺 = around the station, 東京周辺 = the greater Tokyo area). Broader than 付近.

m: stage; phase; step in a process

ex.jp: プロジェクトは現在、計画の段階にある。
ex.en: The project is currently at the planning stage.

qs.s: 交渉はまだ初期の＿＿＿＿で、合意には至っていない。
qs.en: The negotiations are still in the early stage and have not reached an agreement.
qs.e: 段階 = a distinct level or phase in a progression. 過程 = ongoing process (continuous flow). 手順 = procedure, the steps to follow. 状況 = the current situation or conditions.

qs.s: 「段階」の意味は？
o: stage; phase; step in a process
qs.e: 段階 = a distinct step or level (初期段階 = early stage, 最終段階 = final stage). Implies discrete steps rather than a continuous flow.

m: originally; essentially; by nature; as it should be

ex.jp: 本来、この薬は医師の処方が必要だ。
ex.en: Properly speaking, this medicine requires a doctor's prescription.

qs.s: このルールは＿＿＿＿、利用者の安全を守るために作られたものだ。
qs.en: This rule was originally created to protect users' safety.
qs.e: 本来 = in its proper/original nature, as it ought to be (often implies a gap between the ideal and current reality). 元々 = originally, from the start. 当初 = at first, at the beginning. 実際 = actually, in practice.

qs.s: 「本来」の意味は？
o: originally; essentially; as it should be
qs.e: 本来 carries the nuance of 'as it was meant to be' or 'by its very nature,' often implying the current reality differs from the ideal (本来の目的 = the original purpose).

m: creation; drafting; drawing up (a document or plan)

ex.jp: 会議の資料を作成するのに二時間かかった。
ex.en: It took two hours to prepare the materials for the meeting.

qs.s: 申請書の＿＿＿＿には、正確な情報を記入してください。
qs.en: When drafting the application form, please fill in accurate information.
qs.e: 作成 = to create or draft documents, plans, spreadsheets. 制作 = to produce creative works (films, art). 製造 = to manufacture goods. 記入 = to fill in a form.

qs.s: 「作成」の意味は？
o: creating; drafting a document or plan
filling in; writing into a form
qs.e: 作成 is used for making documents, files, or plans (書類を作成する, レポートを作成する). 制作 is for artistic or media productions — the distinction maps roughly to 'drafting' vs 'producing.'

m: impressions; personal thoughts; feelings about something

ex.jp: 映画を見た後、感想を日記に書いた。
ex.en: After watching the film, I wrote my impressions in my diary.

qs.s: 先生は読書の＿＿＿＿を全員に発表させた。
qs.en: The teacher had everyone present their impressions of the reading.
qs.e: 感想 = personal impressions or feelings about something experienced (subjective). 意見 = opinion/view (takes a position). 批評 = critical review. 評価 = evaluation/assessment (often with a score or judgment).

qs.s: 「感想」の意味は？
qs.e: 感想 is subjective and personal — how something felt to you. 意見 is more reasoned and takes a stance. 感想文 = a personal response essay.

ex.jp: セキュリティを強化するために新しいシステムを導入した。
ex.en: A new system was introduced to strengthen security.

qs.s: チームは来シーズンに向けて守備力の＿＿＿＿を図っている。
qs.en: The team is working to reinforce its defensive capability heading into next season.
qs.e: 強化 = making something stronger or more robust (active reinforcement). 改善 = improvement by fixing what's wrong. 向上 = gradual advancement. 発展 = development, expansion.

qs.s: 「強化」の意味は？
qs.e: 強化 emphasizes actively making something stronger or more powerful (筋力強化 = strength training, 規制強化 = tightening regulations, セキュリティ強化 = boosting security).

m: late at night; the dead of night; midnight hours

ex.jp: 深夜まで残業が続いた。
ex.en: The overtime work continued until late at night.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿に大きな地震が起き、多くの人が眠れなかった。
qs.en: A large earthquake struck in the dead of night, leaving many people unable to sleep.
qs.e: 深夜 = late night (roughly midnight to 3 AM). 早朝 = early morning (before or just after sunrise). 夕方 = early evening (around sunset). 夜明け = dawn, daybreak.

qs.s: 「深夜」の意味は？
o: late at night; the dead of night
qs.e: 深夜 = the hours from around midnight to early morning. Common in 深夜番組 (late-night TV programs), 深夜バス (overnight bus).

m: fiscal year; academic year (Japan: April 1 – March 31)

ex.jp: 新年度が始まり、社内のシステムが更新された。
ex.en: The new fiscal year started and the company's internal systems were updated.

qs.s: この予算は今＿＿＿＿中に使い切らなければならない。
qs.en: This budget must be spent within this fiscal year.
qs.e: 年度 = a defined administrative year (Japan: Apr 1–Mar 31). 年間 = throughout a year, annual (duration). 期間 = a period or span of time. 会計 = accounting, finances.

qs.s: 「年度」の意味は？
qs.e: 年度 is the administrative unit of a year used for budgets, school grades, and fiscal reporting in Japan (今年度 = this fiscal year, 来年度 = next fiscal year).

ex.jp: 発表のための資料を準備した。
ex.en: I prepared reference materials for the presentation.

qs.s: この研究に必要な＿＿＿＿は図書館で集めることができる。
qs.en: The materials needed for this research can be gathered at the library.
qs.e: 資料 = reference materials or documents (for study, research, or meetings). 情報 = information (broader). 証拠 = evidence (for proving something). データ = raw numerical or digital data.

qs.s: 「資料」の意味は？
qs.e: 資料 refers to collected documents or materials used as references (会議資料 = meeting handouts, 参考資料 = reference materials, 歴史資料 = historical documents).

m: workplace; place of work; professional environment

ex.jp: 職場の雰囲気がよく、毎日仕事が楽しい。
ex.en: The workplace atmosphere is good, and I enjoy work every day.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿でのハラスメントは、深刻な社会問題となっている。
qs.en: Harassment in the workplace has become a serious social issue.
qs.e: 職場 = the workplace as a social/professional environment. 現場 = the actual physical site or scene (construction site, crime scene, etc.). 業界 = industry/sector. 部署 = department or division within a company.

qs.s: 「職場」の意味は？
o: actual physical site; scene of work
qs.e: 職場 focuses on the human and social environment of a place of work (職場環境 = work environment, 職場復帰 = returning to work after leave).

ex.jp: 予定の調整をするため、カレンダーを確認した。
ex.en: I checked the calendar to coordinate the schedule.

qs.s: 機械の動きがおかしいので、専門家に＿＿＿＿してもらった。
qs.en: Since the machine was behaving strangely, I had a specialist fine-tune it.
qs.e: 調整 = to calibrate or fine-tune (make it work as intended). 修理 = to repair (fix damage or a malfunction). 改良 = to improve (make better). 点検 = to inspect or check.

qs.s: 「調整」の意味は？
qs.e: 調整 covers calibrating, tuning, or coordinating things (日程調整 = schedule coordination, 音量調整 = volume adjustment, 微調整 = fine adjustment).

ex.jp: 新商品の宣伝のために、テレビCMを放映した。
ex.en: A TV commercial was broadcast to advertise the new product.

qs.s: 口コミは最も効果的な＿＿＿＿の一つだと言われている。
qs.en: Word of mouth is said to be one of the most effective forms of advertising.
qs.e: 宣伝 = promotion/publicity (broad — includes campaigns and word of mouth). 広告 = advertisement (specifically paid media). 告知 = announcement/notification. 報告 = report.

qs.s: 「宣伝」の意味は？
qs.e: 宣伝 = broadly spreading information to promote something (宣伝活動 = promotional activities, 自己宣伝 = self-promotion). Includes any channel, paid or not.
